description: Simmons awakens strapped into a device for mapping her brain by the Fitz LMD, who tries to reassure her about living together in the Framework. Simmons, despite her injury, manages to escape her restraints, critically damages the Fitz LMD using heavy machinery and ultimately disables it by stabbing it in the neck, showcasing her determination and resourcefulness.

transcript.line: I need you conscious to map your frontal lobe, so you can't be too heavily sedated. The rest you can sleep through.
